creator: sabatini@unipg.it
text:
When I try to compile the kernel or an other pakages I have this problem.
If I try to continue ( make ... error ... make ...error ) the
pakages is compiled. 
I have compiled the new kernel in this mode and run OK.

How-To-Repeat: when I try to compile the complex pakages or the kernel.
For exmple I try to compile the xtacacs 4.0 beta 6 and 
I haven't this problem.
